senses.gloss: a loose piece of paper on which has been written, a sheet, letters, paper

examples.text: أَرْسِلِي إِلَيْنَا بِالصُّحُفِ نَنْسَخُهَا فِي الْمَصَاحِفِ ثُمَّ نَرُدُّهَا إِلَيْكِ
examples.english: Send to us the sheets so we can transcribe manuscripts from them and thereafter we will return them.

senses.gloss: an amount of paper in a bound work, a page or leaf of a physical book, a sheet such as a كُرَّاسَة (kurrāsa), record
